description: Vital Recorder is open on the Windows desktop. As part of a retrospective case review using intraoperative vital signs recordings from the VitalDB open dataset, export the data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\VitalRecorderData\case 0001.vital and case 0002.vital to CSV format at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\case_0001_data.csv and C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\case_0002_data.csv respectively. Create a comparison summary text file at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\case_comparison.txt documenting the differences between the two cases regarding recording duration, available physiological tracks, and the surgical event timeline (case start, surgery start, surgery finish, case finish). Login: Desktop user (no login required for Vital Recorder).
